root_text.an5.236:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.236:1.5: ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti;
root_text.an5.236:1.6: ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti;
root_text.an5.236:1.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.236:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.236:2.5: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti;
root_text.an5.236:2.6: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti;
root_text.an5.236:2.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.236:1.1: “Mendicants, a resident mendicant with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.236:1.3: Without examining or scrutinizing, they praise those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.236:1.4: and they criticize those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.236:1.5: Without examining or scrutinizing, they arouse faith in things that are dubious,
translation_text.an5.236:1.6: and they don’t arouse faith in things that are inspiring.
translation_text.an5.236:1.7: And they waste a gift given in faith.
translation_text.an5.236:1.8: A resident mendicant with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.236:2.1: A resident mendicant with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.236:2.3: After examining and scrutinizing, they criticize those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.236:2.4: and they praise those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.236:2.5: They don’t arouse faith in things that are dubious,
translation_text.an5.236:2.6: and they do arouse faith in things that are inspiring.
translation_text.an5.236:2.7: And they don’t waste a gift given in faith.
translation_text.an5.236:2.8: A resident mendicant with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
